projectDescription: A browser-based AI chatbot powered by the Groq API and LLaMA 3.1, featuring a glassmorphism UI, session memory, and a customizable bot personality.
keyFeatures: Groq API integration with llama-3.1-8b-instant model
Glassmorphism UI with animated background blobs
Session memory to maintain conversation context
Customizable bot personality via system prompt
API key stored securely in localStorage
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
publicApiSurface: getAIResponse(prompt) — sends user message to Groq API and returns bot reply
addMessage(text, sender) — renders a chat bubble in the messages area
localStorage key: GROQ_API_KEY — stores the user's Groq API key
messages[] — in-memory conversation history array passed to the API
